session.user:

Report all output including any failures. Focus on whether it passes or fails.
session.assistant: I'll execute the `make fast-ci` command in the repository root and report all output.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Execute fast-ci target to run quick CI checks

session.tool_result:

session.assistant:
## Summary
**make fast-ci PASSED**
All checks and tests passed successfully:
- **Lint**: All checks passed - **Format Check**: 1689 files already formatted - **Prettier Check**: All matched files use Prettier code style - **Markdown Check**: Passed - **Exec Reference Check**: `.claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md` is up to date - **Type Checking (ty)**: All checks passed - **Unit Tests (erk)**: 5978 passed, 2 warnings in 14.63s - **Tests (erk-dev)**: 136 passed in 6.08s - **Tests (erk-statusline)**: 115 passed in 0.85s - **Tests (erk-mcp)**: 31 passed, AGENTS.md standard PASSED - **CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md pairing**: 19 files checked, 0 violations
The complete fast-ci suite completed successfully with no failures.
